title: ambiguous ORDER BY clause not checked
poc: select args.id, types.id from args, types order by id limit 10;
key_bug_features: ambiguous ORDER BY clause in SQL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE orders (id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', NULL), (3, 'Charlie', 25);
INSERT INTO orders (id, user_id, amount) VALUES (1, 1, 100.50), (2, 2, 200.00), (3, 3, NULL);
SELECT users.id, orders.amount FROM users JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;
